de.uka.ilkd.key.java.recoderext

Class RKeYMetaConstructExpression

  • java.lang.Object
    • recoder.java.JavaSourceElement
      • recoder.java.JavaProgramElement
        • recoder.java.expression.Literal
          • de.uka.ilkd.key.java.recoderext.RKeYMetaConstructExpression
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    KeYRecoderExtension, Serializable, Cloneable, Expression, ExpressionContainer, NonTerminalProgramElement, ProgramElement, SourceElement, TerminalProgramElement, ModelElement

    public class RKeYMetaConstructExpression
extends Literal
implements ExpressionContainer, KeYRecoderExtension
